evidence: Frozen dispatch de5c0a561c97b09f51a2338c01ecc88cbf64d6da4b97bf0ed65fef5d573443c1 passed independent checker and reviewer after two pre-execution repairs; research auditor accepted the bounded result; implementation fixtures remain explicitly unexecuted.

Operator clarified that the existing 1B whitepaper value will be replaced. Refine preserved historical stage receipts, superseded the binding-1B and no-supply-coupling conclusions in current synthesis, and reframed cohort-root plus post-close beacon as the leading unvalidated selector.
Three-moment audition has 3 required moments and 6 projected/spoken surfaces; source/editorial checks pass except the mandatory human voice gate; complete deck and HTML generation remain blocked.

Version one sounded procedural. Version two uses original collective declaration, rejection/choice contrast, One/Many imagery, and future-facing cadence derived from the public Augmentatism manifesto language behavior; full generation remains blocked.

Approved version-two voice recomposed into separate 12-moment presenter and projection decks. Editorial, source, authority, structural, and diff checks pass; HTML and browser validation were not requested or generated.

The blueprint makes Resonant Time Capsule the product, Number Lottery the founding supply-selection ritual, and the 2/5/10-year returns explicit. It includes product/system views, evidence tiers, load-bearing gaps, verification witnesses, eight stages, events, risks, non-goals, and next decisions; mechanism remains unvalidated.

Public copy was reduced to ordinary actions: pick the range, add a word, lock the capsule, get the number, and open it again. Desktop/mobile checks show no horizontal or card overflow, 48px CTAs, loaded image, and zero console errors or warnings.

Confirmed five-lane deferred-contribution dispatch completed with PASS/PASS tension gate, one reviewer zig-zag, one exact auditor repair, final ACCEPT, five subtower prior-art returns, strategy-result inventory entry, and append-only close. Investment/cashing aliases were killed; the surviving no-effect relevance-review candidate remains blocked before fixture use on unregistered definitions and unrun E1-E4 witnesses.

evidence: After two operator corrections, the approved voice fixes contribution status and makes mechanism comparison the open problem. Eight affected Markdown link checks, 18-slide HTML structure, JavaScript syntax, projected-surface separation, inventory sync, whitespace, and diff checks pass. Browser and live-cohort witnesses remain explicitly flagged.

Real Chromium execution passed button, keyboard, hash, endpoint, projected-surface, 18-slide desktop geometry, and 18-slide mobile geometry checks. A clean launch logged one missing favicon 404, so the predeclared console-clean obligation and overall Task Session remain flagged. Live-cohort and mechanism validation stayed out of scope.

A standalone sendable Markdown page translates the three open deferred-contribution bets into ordinary language, preserves separate falsifiers and evidence non-inheritance, places investment/realization/cashing beside non-monetary operational meanings, and states that no experiment, reward program, policy, or authority effect exists. Register alignment, public-boundary scan, Markdown links, whitespace, inventory sync, and diff checks pass.

An anonymized workshop-derived guide now covers contribution families, planning and result dimensions, Agile estimation limits, informative failures, reviewer conflict and bounded randomness, history, qualified-pool lotteries, newcomer access, allocation inflation, six unregistered experiments, definition routes, source posture, and authority blocks. Strict inventory regeneration reports 27 entries; machine query, participant-name privacy scan, local links, whitespace, and diff checks pass.

The monetary-circulation program extension now has a reusable strategy-result entry linked to its tower and unregistered PASS/PASS research proposal. The generated machine index contains 29 entries; index parseability, disk coverage, source paths, controlled tags, local links, whitespace, and JSON sheet checks pass. No dispatch or monetary experiment ran.

The confirmed bounded monetary-circulation dispatch admitted 23 component precedents, completed three-skeptic robot talks, replaced MC-V with explicitly incomplete MC-R, killed generic MC-E6, marked every surviving local handoff unrunnable, preserved Phase 2 and authority boundaries, and closed resolved after one auditor repair and final ACCEPT. No monetary experiment or policy ran.
